title: geigeria schinzii subsp. sebungweensis
intro: Geigeria schinzii subsp. sebungweensis is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly known for its medicinal properties. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in local medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, which are typically brewed from its leaves, roots, or stems.
